title: /rpcencoded
text: /rpcencoded Create an RPC/Encoded WSDL file from the signature of a Uniface signature. /rpcencoded Used With /sto /mwr =ws Description With the /rpcencoded subswitch, the binding style of the exported WSDL file is RPC/Encoded. Without the /rpcencoded subswitch, the binding style is Document/Literal Wrapped. Related Links WSDL The Web Services Description Language (WSDL) is an XML-based language for describing Web services and how to access them. Exporting WSDL and Schema Files for Web Services Call-In The WSDL export facility creates WSDL and XSD files from Uniface signatures. These files are used by web service requesters to call the web service. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
